portwatch_chokepoints.note: Daily AIS-derived tanker counts. Anomaly = 7-day mean below threshold vs pre-crisis baseline OR 30d avg (ports avg>=5). T6-S45: 7d mean (was single-day, smooths ~5d feed lag) + strategic ports alert at -40% (0.60), others -50% (0.50).

items.title: Oil and LNG Tankers Go Dark Again as Hormuz Crisis Deepens
items.summary: Oil and LNG tankers are back to switching off transponders when transiting the Strait of Hormuz as the latest escalation in the region and last week’s Iranian attacks on commercial ships prompted vessel operators to brave the chokepoint unobserved...

items.title: Oil Prices Surge 4% as U.S.-Iran Escalation Rekindles Supply Fears
items.summary: Oil prices jumped by 4% in Asian trade on Monday, following a weekend of intense U.S. strikes on Iran, claims from Iran that the Strait of Hormuz is closed to traffic once again, and Iranian strikes on five U.S. allies in the region. Brent Crude f...

items.title: Iran Strikes 5 Gulf Countries as Regional Escalation Continues
items.summary: Iran has opened a new front across the Gulf, striking countries that host U.S. forces and sit beside the oil, gas, and shipping infrastructure sustaining the global energy system. Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, and Jordan all reported Iranian missi...

items.title: Big Oil’s War-Related Profits Anger Governments
items.summary: Supermajors are set to report bumper profits for the second quarter thanks to the surge in oil and gas prices, driven higher by the hostilities between the United States, Israel, and Iran. This is a problem for governments—notably the Trump admini...

items.title: Uruguay’s Offshore Oil Province Could Be Bigger Than Vaca Muerta
items.summary: Companies are gearing up for exploration drilling in deepwater blocks offshore Uruguay in the hope that the South Atlantic margin offshore South America could hold a lot of oil, similar to the recent discoveries offshore Namibia in Africa. Uruguay...

items.title: The Next Bull Market Could Be Built on Inventory Replenishment
items.summary: The Middle East is once again at the center of global energy markets due to the renewed military confrontation involving Iran. Markets, however, should recognize that, unlike in previous crises, the world is entering this new phase with a signific...

items.title: The Escalating Energy War Between California and the White House
items.summary: In recent years, California has grown increasingly progressive in its energy policy, shifting away from fossil fuels toward renewable alternatives. The state has invested heavily in developing its renewable energy capacity over the last decade, in...

items.title: Can Colombia’s New Government Reverse the Nation’s Oil and Gas Decline?
items.summary: In a closely contested presidential election in Colombia, controversial far-right candidate Abelardo de la Espriella emerged victorious. After an official recount, his opponent, left-wing senator Ivan Cepeda, conceded defeat. This was a hard-fough...

items.title: Can Europe Beat the Heat Without More Air Conditioners?
items.summary: With Europe facing more frequent and hotter heatwaves, the uptake of air conditioning systems has soared across the region in recent years. This trend is driving energy demand and making it more difficult for countries to reduce reliance on fossil...

items.title: Kazakhstan Extends Petroleum Export Ban Six Months as Hormuz Tensions Flare
items.summary: Kazakhstan is growing more possessive of its petroleum products as a gasoline shortage tightens its grip in Russia and the US-Iran conflict reignites. Kazakh officials have established new police checkpoints on almost 60 roads along the country’s...

thermometer.ethical_notes: Public posts only · No PII storage · ≥3 sources required for alert · 24h cooldown · alerts NEVER replace official sources · TOS-compliant

comunicacoes.label: Comunicacoes
comunicacoes.note: Tema severamente sub-instrumentado: 1 de 4+ indicadores presentes.

defesa.label: Defesa
defesa.note: Tema severamente sub-instrumentado: incendios e o gap mais critico (PT/Norte alto risco).

themes.note: Decomposicao em 8 temas da enciclopedia (T6-S26). Score=None quando dados insuficientes. Anti-synthetic: nao fabrica scores. Cada tema lista gaps_to_close_priority com APIs livres a integrar em S27+.
